headline: Kroger (KR) Awaits Giant Eagle Review As Tempo Starts Cook Never Club
summary: Kroger (NYSE:KR) is preparing for regulatory review of its proposed acquisition of regional grocer Giant Eagle, with expectations that some store divestitures may be required. Tempo, a Kroger affiliated brand, has launched the Cook Never Club, a meal service focused on convenient, dietitian approved options and community engagement. Kroger, trading at $56.56, is drawing fresh attention as it pursues the Giant Eagle acquisition while expanding its food service offerings. The stock is down...
